user.title: Zero Net Export
user.description: Create the Zero Net Export backend entry first, then finish setup inside the Zero Net Export panel in the Home Assistant sidebar. Runtime defaults start in a safe bootstrap state until you map sources and add devices in the panel.

data_description.name: This is just the label Home Assistant will show for this Zero Net Export system. Pick something human-friendly, like the site, inverter, or switchboard name. You can finish source mapping, refresh tuning, and device onboarding after entry creation inside the panel app.

panel.title: Use the Zero Net Export panel
panel.description:
The intended operator workflow now lives in the Zero Net Export panel, not in raw options fields.

Open the Home Assistant sidebar item **Zero Net Export** or browse directly to `{panel_path}`.

Use that panel to:
- map required solar/grid/home sources
- add and edit controllable devices
- review readiness and diagnostics
- move from installed -> mapped -> operational

Integration: **{entry_title}**

If you still need backend-level recovery controls, go back and choose **Advanced defaults / recovery**.

advanced.title: Advanced defaults / recovery

data_description.target_export_w: The export value the controller aims for during normal operation. Leave this at 0 W unless you intentionally want a small export or import bias.
data_description.deadband_w: How much error Zero Net Export will tolerate before changing devices. Higher values reduce device flapping; lower values chase the target more aggressively.
data_description.battery_reserve_soc: The minimum battery percentage to protect before discretionary surplus-absorption actions are allowed. Choose the lowest battery level you still want to keep in reserve.
data_description.refresh_seconds: How often the backend re-reads your source sensors and re-plans control actions. Shorter intervals react faster; longer intervals reduce churn.
data_description.device_inventory_json: Advanced recovery/debugging fallback only. Normal operators should add and edit devices in the Zero Net Export panel instead of pasting raw JSON here.

error.device_inventory_invalid: The device inventory JSON is invalid or incomplete.

abort.panel_only: Open the Zero Net Export sidebar panel to continue setup (direct path: /zero-net-export).
